overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a green jacket exploring a foggy hotel courtyard and interior. The character walks through a misty brick patio, enters a grand wooden lobby, traverses a dark wallpapered corridor, and exits onto a foggy balcony. The atmosphere is horror-themed with heavy fog and dim lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy hotel courtyard with brick patio

agents.ego_description: walking steadily around the foggy courtyard, approaching the hotel entrance

entered.detail: red brick paved courtyard surface
light-colored siding hotel exterior with multiple windows
white outdoor chairs and tables arranged on the patio
tall green hedge forming a boundary wall
flowering plants in large planters
glass-paneled double doors serving as the main entrance
exterior light fixtures mounted on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy brick courtyard surrounded by a white hotel building and tall hedges. White patio furniture sits unused in the mist as the character approaches the glass french doors of the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel entrance doorway transitioning from exterior to interior

events.description: character opens and walks through the french doors from the foggy exterior into the hotel lobby

agents.ego_description: approaching and opening the french doors to enter the building

entered.detail: threshold between the exterior and the grand lobby interior
glimpse of the grand lobby space visible through the opening doors

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the french doors, transitioning from the foggy courtyard into the sheltered hotel entrance. The bright exterior fog gives way to the dimmer interior lighting as the lobby becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hotel lobby with staircase and chandeliers

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious lobby, observing the ornate interior architecture

entered.detail: polished wooden flooring with geometric patterns
ornate wooden staircase with balustrade leading to upper floor
large ornate ceiling light fixture with multiple bulbs
tall arched windows with grid panes allowing diffused light
decorative wooden cabinet with blue ceramic detailing
wall-mounted light fixtures with warm glow
large wooden doors with glass panels at the far end of the lobby

segments.scene_description: The character explores the grand hotel lobby with its polished wooden floors, ornate staircase, and large chandeliers. The space features arched windows, decorative cabinets, and leads toward wooden double doors at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wallpapered corridor with dim lighting

events.description: lighting shifts from bright lobby chandeliers to dim corridor wall lamps

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the narrow dark corridor, flashlight illuminating the walls

entered.detail: narrow hallway with patterned wallpaper and wooden trim
landscape paintings in wooden frames hanging on the walls
small lamp on a wooden table against the wall
closed wooden door with frame along the corridor
open doorway leading to a lit room at the end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, dimly lit corridor with patterned wallpaper and framed paintings. The lighting drops significantly compared to the lobby, with only wall lamps and a flashlight providing illumination as the character approaches a doorway at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel room with balcony overlooking foggy exterior

events.description: character exits through balcony doors from the room back into the foggy outdoor environment

agents.ego_description: entering the hotel room and walking out onto the foggy balcony

entered.detail: bed with blue bedding visible in the room
open french doors leading to the exterior balcony
white metal railing along the balcony edge
tall green hedges visible through the fog beyond the railing
exterior wall of the building visible on the right

segments.scene_description: The character enters a hotel room with a bed and desk, then walks through open balcony doors back into the foggy exterior. The balcony features a metal railing with foggy hedges visible beyond, returning to the misty atmosphere of the opening scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a misty outdoor courtyard through the opulent interior of a hotel and back out into the fog. It begins with the character navigating a brick patio surrounded by white walls and tall hedges, moving through the haze toward glass french doors. As the character passes through these doors, the bright exterior fog gives way to the dimmer, sheltered atmosphere of a grand lobby featuring polished wooden floors, ornate chandeliers, and a sweeping staircase. The scene then shifts from the open lobby into a narrow, dimly lit corridor where the light drops significantly, leaving only wall lamps and a flashlight to illuminate patterned wallpaper and framed paintings. Finally, the camera moves through a hotel room and out onto a balcony, returning to the cold, misty air and foggy hedges that mirror the opening environment.
